title: Notifications -  Low Battery OFF
scenario: Low Battery notification suppressed in Poly Lens Menu does not reappear after power cycling a device with battery below 5%
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app → Home screen
Tap Menu (hamburger icon) → General → Notifications & Device Alerts
Locate 'Low Battery' toggle and turn it OFF
Connect a Poly Bluetooth audio device with battery level below 5%
Power cycle the device: Press and hold the Power button to turn it OFF, then press and hold again to turn it ON
Observe the phone for any 'Device has a low battery' notification
expected: No 'Device has a low battery' notification appears on the phone after power cycling the device.
